economic_notes: Band owns 97% of Twin Falls Limited Partnership (hydro electric), 100% of Kagiano Power Corporation (general partner of Twin Falls), 51% of Umbata Falls Limited Partnership (energy sector). BMI-Maamwigaaboo Contracting Limited Partnership is a government business partnership. Capacity funding agreement with Williams Operating Corporation to support economic development. Timber harvesting contract with AV Terrace Bay Inc. Road maintenance contract with Nawiingnokiima Forest Management Corporation.
notes: Consolidated entity includes Biigtigong Dbenjgan Ltd., Begetekong Trust, and MKWA Timber Limited Partnership as fully consolidated subsidiaries. Government Business Enterprises (equity method): Twin Falls Limited Partnership (97% owned, hydro electric), Kagiano Power Corporation (100%), and Umbata Falls Limited Partnership (51%). Government Business Partnership (equity method): BMI-Maamwigaaboo Contracting Limited Partnership. The Band has no liability for Umbata Falls LP due to accumulated losses of $11,592,730 at Dec 31 2019. total_government_transfers calculated as Federal ($4,770,368) + Provincial ($1,607,933). ISC funding extracted from Note 4 Due from Government Organizations as Indigenous Services Canada receivable ($489,396); actual ISC transfer revenue not separately disclosed in income statement — isc_funding set to federal receivable as proxy. Capital Projects expense of $2,103,393 not mapped to infrastructure. Energy and Forestry expense of $1,346,868 not separately mapped. GBE earnings/losses shown separately in operations statement.
